controller.title: HydroQ controller
controller.description: Select the ESPHome controller and hardware profile for this zone.

lighting.title: Grow lights kit
lighting.description: The main controller always has 4 light stand relays. Choose an optional additional kit if you flash a wifi-relay / Grow Lights board. You can change this later in HydroQ options.

mapping.title: Assign hardware
mapping.description: Confirm sensor and actuator bindings. For lights, pick switches from the controller and/or HydroQ Grow Lights board.

frontend.title: Lovelace cards (HACS)
frontend.description:
The HydroQ operator dashboard needs these frontend cards from HACS before use:

• Mushroom Cards
• Bubble Card
• Mini Graph Card
• Vertical Stack In Card

Install them in HACS → Frontend, then reload the browser. HydroQ cannot install cards automatically.

data.cards_installed: I installed the required Lovelace cards via HACS

error.cards_required: Confirm the required HACS cards are installed to continue.

abort.no_devices: No devices found. Add your ESPHome controller first.

lighting.title: Lighting kit
lighting.description: Main board always has 4 stands. After flashing an additional Grow Lights board, pick Controller+kit size and map the new switches. Dashboard updates after save.

tds_scale.title: TDS meter scale
tds_scale.description: Recipes use EC (mS/cm). Choose whether your meter reports ppm on the 500 or 700 scale. Targets are recomputed; no dose runs.

recipes.title: Manage plant recipes
recipes.description: Built-in plants cannot be overwritten. Copy a built-in to customize, or add your own.

recipe_stage.title: Stage {stage} ({index}/{total})
recipe_stage.description: Configure {plant} — {stage}. Duration 0 on the last stage means no auto advance past it.

uncalibrated.title: Sensors need calibration
uncalibrated.description: Run HydroQ calibration before enabling auto dosing.
